summary: The protagonist and Hajin realize their target, "that guy," had anticipated their pursuit and intentionally baited them, necessitating a careful approach to the escalating fight. The battle intensifies as the opponent uses explosive power and an unusually durable sword imbued with golden mana, forcing the protagonist to adapt tactics. Despite their efforts, Suho gains the upper hand in the confrontation, catching the protagonist off guard. The situation then takes a shocking turn with the sudden appearance of "demonic humans," introducing a new and ominous threat.
key_moments: The protagonist and Hajin discover their target had anticipated their plans and intentionally baited them.
The fight escalates against Suho, who exhibits explosive power and wields an unusually strong, golden-mana imbued sword.
The conflict takes an unexpected turn with the sudden arrival of "demonic humans."
